design_philosophy.core_concept: Learning feels like exploring a floating garden. Everything is light, airy, and tactile.

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-slate-800 drop-shadow-sm
scale.caption: text-sm font-bold text-slate-400 uppercase tracking-wider

gradients.bg_mesh: radial-gradient(at 0% 0%, hsla(152,100%,90%,1) 0, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 100% 0%, hsla(190,100%,92%,1) 0, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 100% 100%, hsla(37,100%,91%,1) 0, transparent 50%)

GlassCard.description: The fundamental building block. Looks like a frosted piece of quartz.

Button.primary: relative overflow-hidden bg-emerald-500 hover:bg-emerald-400 text-white font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 shadow-[0_10px_20px_-10px_rgba(16,185,129,0.5)] transition-all transform active:scale-95 hover:-translate-y-1
Button.secondary: bg-white/80 hover:bg-white text-emerald-600 font-bold rounded-full px-6 py-3 border border-emerald-100 shadow-sm backdrop-blur-sm transition-all

RoadmapNode.active: w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-emerald-400 border-4 border-white shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center animate-pulse
RoadmapNode.locked: w-12 h-12 rounded-full bg-slate-200 border-4 border-white opacity-50 grayscale
RoadmapNode.completed: w-14 h-14 rounded-full bg-emerald-500 border-4 border-white shadow-md flex items-center justify-center text-white

GameContainer.wrapper: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/20 backdrop-blur-sm p-4
GameContainer.inner: w-full max-w-4xl bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-[2.5rem] shadow-2xl overflow-hidden border border-white/60 relative

UnifiedLessonPage.structure: Grid Layout: 12 cols. Sidebar (3 cols) for Roadmap, Main (9 cols) for Content.
UnifiedLessonPage.sidebar: h-screen sticky top-0 bg-white/40 backdrop-blur-lg border-r border-white/30 flex flex-col items-center py-10 overflow-y-auto hidden md:flex
UnifiedLessonPage.mobile_nav: Fixed bottom bar with glass effect for mobile roadmap access.

GameArea.style: Everything outside the game container should be blurred. The game container itself is a 'stage'.

general: Use 'Fredoka' font for all headings. It makes the app feel child-friendly immediately.
Rounded corners should be EXTREME (rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl). No sharp edges.
Shadows should be colored, not black. E.g., shadow-emerald-200.
Never use pure black text. Use slate-700 or slate-800.
Add 'hover:scale-105' transitions to almost every interactive card. Kids love feedback.
Use the 'GlassCard' style for all major containers.

instructions_to_main_agent: Step 1: Update index.css to import 'Fredoka' and 'Nunito' fonts.
Step 2: Apply the background gradient (bg_mesh) to the main App wrapper.
Step 3: Redesign 'UnifiedLessonPage' to use the Glass Sidebar layout.
Step 4: Update game components (ListenChoose, Memory, etc.) to use GlassCard containers and the new rounded buttons.
Step 5: Replace any hardcoded standard fonts with the new typography classes.
CRITICAL: Ensure the 'Green and White' theme is dominant. Use Emerald-500 for primary actions.
